packs.name: AR Collections Assistant
packs.description: Automates accounts-receivable collections workflows: overdue invoice detection, reminder drafting, escalation routing, and payment reconciliation. Integrates with ERP systems via MCP tools. Requires AR_ERP_URL and AR_ERP_TOKEN environment variables.

overdue_days_threshold.description: Days past due before sending first reminder

escalation_days_threshold.description: Days past due before escalating to collections team

packs.name: Incident Triage
packs.description: On-call incident triage assistant: classifies severity, correlates related alerts, drafts runbooks, and pages the right team. Connects to PagerDuty, Opsgenie, or webhooks. Reduces mean-time-to-acknowledge by surfacing context from past incidents.

auto_page_threshold.description: Minimum severity level for automatic paging

context_window_hours.description: Hours of past incidents to include as context

packs.name: PR Review Assistant
packs.description: Automated pull-request review: checks for style violations, security anti-patterns, missing tests, and documentation gaps. Posts inline comments via the GitHub or GitLab API. Configurable checklist per repository.

review_scope.description: Whether to review the full file or only changed lines

require_tests.description: Flag PRs that reduce test coverage

max_files_per_review.description: Skip review if PR touches more files than this

packs.name: HR Onboarding
packs.description: Guided employee onboarding assistant: answers policy questions, schedules orientation meetings, tracks completion of required readings, and generates personalised 30/60/90-day plans. Integrates with HRIS and calendar systems.

onboarding_duration_days.description: Length of the structured onboarding period

send_welcome_email.description: Automatically send welcome email on first login

checklist_template.description: Which onboarding checklist template to use

packs.name: Legal Document RAG
packs.description: Retrieval-augmented Q&A over a legal document corpus: contracts, policies, court opinions, and regulatory filings. Answers questions with source citations and confidence scores. Index your documents via the CLI before enabling.

collection_id.description: RAG collection slug to search (must be indexed first)

top_k.description: Number of chunks to retrieve per query

citation_style.description: How citations appear in the response

packs.name: Finance Document RAG
packs.description: Retrieval-augmented Q&A over financial documents: annual reports, earnings calls, 10-K/10-Q filings, analyst notes, and internal finance policies. Ideal for FP&A teams doing research across large document sets.

collection_id.description: RAG collection slug to search (must be indexed first)

top_k.description: Number of chunks to retrieve per query

fiscal_year_filter.description: Restrict results to the current fiscal year by default

packs.name: HR Policy RAG
packs.description: Retrieval-augmented Q&A over HR documents: employee handbook, benefits guides, PTO policy, code of conduct, and org charts. Employees ask natural-language questions; the assistant cites the exact policy paragraph.

collection_id.description: RAG collection slug to search (must be indexed first)

top_k.description: Number of chunks to retrieve per query

strict_policy_only.description: Decline to answer questions not grounded in retrieved policy text

packs.name: DevOps On-Call
packs.description: Real-time alert triage and runbook automation for on-call engineers. Classifies incoming alerts (P1/P2/P3), maps them to suspected components, looks up matching runbook steps, and attaches an observability snapshot (metrics + log excerpts) before paging the engineer. Distinct from incident-triage, which handles post-incident RCA. Supports PagerDuty, Opsgenie, and Alertmanager inbound sources.

auto_p1_statuspage.description: Automatically open a Statuspage incident for P1 alerts (requires STATUSPAGE_API_KEY)

snapshot_lookback_minutes.description: Minutes of observability history to include in the snapshot

runbook_match_threshold.description: Minimum runbook match score before falling back to the generic triage runbook

similar_incident_days.description: Days of history to search for similar past incidents

packs.name: Sales Qualification (BANT + MEDDIC)
packs.description: Multi-agent lead qualification using BANT (Budget/Authority/Need/Timeline) and MEDDIC (Metrics/Economic Buyer/Decision Criteria/Decision Process/Identify Pain/Champion) frameworks. Ingests leads from HubSpot webhooks, Salesforce platform events, or email threads. Outputs structured qualification scores, evidence quotes, MEDDIC completeness checklists, and next-action recommendations. All CRM write-backs are HOTL-gated.

bant_pass_threshold.description: Minimum BANT score (0–100) to advance a lead to MEDDIC deep-dive

meddic_complete_threshold.description: Minimum MEDDIC completeness % to mark a lead as Sales-Qualified

deal_stage_on_sqo.description: CRM deal stage name applied when a lead becomes a Sales-Qualified Opportunity

enrichment_enabled.description: Run web-search enrichment for leads with insufficient BANT data

weekly_digest_cron.description: Cron expression for the weekly pipeline digest (default: Monday 08:00 UTC)

packs.name: Marketing Content
packs.description: Content generation and repurposing pack — turns a creative brief into a full blog article, then derives platform-tuned social posts and email campaign copy. Triggered by Notion, Contentful, or manual webhooks. All outbound publishes are HOTL-gated.

packs.name: Customer Success
packs.description: Customer success pack — ticket triage, NPS theme extraction, churn-risk scoring, and QBR prep. Ingests Zendesk tickets, Intercom conversations, and Segment usage events.

packs.name: Security Audit
packs.description: Security operations pack — auth log anomaly triage, dependency CVE prioritization with blast-radius scoring, SOC 2 evidence collation per control ID, and entropy-based secret leak scanning over git diffs.

packs.name: Legal Contract Review
packs.description: NDA / MSA / SOW operational review pack — clause extraction, redline suggestions, and risk scoring. Triggered by DocuSign events, Google Drive watches, or manual upload.

packs.name: Recruiting Screen
packs.description: Multi-agent pipeline for resume parsing, JD matching, and bias-checked candidate screening. Parses structured resume fields, scores against job description, runs bias audit, and emits screening notes.

packs.name: Finance FP&A
packs.description: Operational FP&A intelligence: monitors actuals vs. budget, flags material variances, rolls up budget across cost-centres, and drafts board-ready forecast commentary. Distinct from rag-finance.

packs.name: DevRel Content
packs.description: Developer Relations content automation pack — GitHub issue triage, weekly community digest from Discord/Discourse/GitHub, tutorial outline drafting, and DX feedback synthesis.

packs.name: Product Research
packs.description: Ingests customer interview transcripts (Gong, Dovetail) and survey exports (Typeform, CSV), extracts verbatim-grounded themes, clusters into JTBD statements, sizes opportunities, and synthesises persona cards.

packs.name: Data Engineering Pipeline
packs.description: Data freshness SLA monitoring and lineage breadcrumb tracking for ETL/ELT pipelines. Detects row-count drops and latency spikes, dispatches investigation agents, and recommends retries within HOTL guardrails.

packs.name: ML Ops
packs.description: Monitors deployed ML models for drift and quality degradation, aggregates evaluation suite results, and triggers retrain workflows or shadow deployments when thresholds are breached. All retrain dispatches are HOTL-gated.

packs.name: Exec Briefing
packs.description: Multi-agent skill pack that delivers KPI digest briefings to executive audiences. Collects north-star and functional metrics, flags anomalies, writes plain-English narrative, and distributes by email, Slack, and slide stub.

packs.name: Email Triage
packs.description: Inbox prioritization and draft-response pack. Classifies incoming email by sender type and urgency (P0–P3), summarises threads, and drafts responses. PII-safe: no full email body in audit logs.

packs.name: Media Monitoring
packs.description: Monitors brand mentions and press coverage across social and news channels. Classifies sentiment, detects volume spikes and sentiment crashes, clusters emerging narratives, and delivers crisis early warnings with response-strategy recommendations.

packs.name: Customer Onboarding
packs.description: Multi-agent skill pack for managing B2B customer onboarding from contract-signed through POC execution to expansion-ready. Coaches milestones, detects stalls, scores POC success, and produces CSM handoff packages.

packs.name: Knowledge Base Curator
packs.description: Knowledge-base health pack — ingests support tickets and article metadata, extracts FAQ candidates from ticket clusters, flags stale articles against product release notes, deduplicates near-duplicate articles, and checks broken outbound links.

packs.name: RevOps Territory
packs.description: Automates account assignment to sales reps (industry + size + geo + specialty + capacity scoring), monitors rep load imbalance, audits fairness, and produces data-driven quota proposals.

packs.name: Partner Enablement
packs.description: Multi-agent skill pack for partner channel management. Routes and validates inbound deal registrations, detects pipeline conflicts with direct sales, assembles co-sell meeting briefs, and scores partner tiers.

packs.name: Research Paper Survey
packs.description: Automates literature review: polls arXiv for new papers, walks citation graphs to find central works, clusters topics to identify research gaps, and drafts survey sections. Publishes to Notion and exports LaTeX snippets.

packs.name: Privacy DSAR
packs.description: Multi-agent skill pack for end-to-end DSAR lifecycle management under GDPR, CCPA, and similar regulations. Handles intake, identity verification, data scope mapping, evidence gathering, and erasure-cascade recommendations. All exports are HOTL-gated.

packs.name: Vendor Management
packs.description: Monitors third-party vendor risk through continuous watch of renewal windows, annual assessment recertification, and per-category spend concentration. LLM agents compile risk scores and recommend renewal or exit actions.

packs.name: Training Feedback
packs.description: Multi-agent skill pack that ingests post-course learner feedback from LMS platforms, classifies free-text responses into themes, identifies learning gaps, and produces instructor digests and course-redesign proposals.

packs.name: Events Management
packs.description: Multi-agent skill pack for end-to-end event management: registration triage with VIP detection and waitlist routing, personalized speaker outreach, session content QC, and no-show prediction.

packs.name: App Store Reviews
packs.description: Monitors iOS App Store and Google Play reviews for your app and configured competitors. Classifies sentiment and clusters by theme, extracts bug reports for engineering, ranks fixes by impact, and delivers weekly exec digests. Drafts response templates only — never posts directly.

packs.name: Tax Prep
packs.description: Monitors US sales-tax nexus thresholds across all 50 jurisdictions, drafts and tracks sales tax returns, sends filing-deadline alerts, and supports audit-defense package assembly. All filing outputs are HOTL-gated (mandatory human signer).

packs.name: Lease Management
packs.description: Monitors real-estate and equipment lease portfolios for renewal windows, rent escalations, CAM/TICAM overcharges, insurance-cert expirations, and annual audit obligations. All commitment actions are HOTL-gated.

packs.name: IT Asset Tracking
packs.description: Manages the full lifecycle of hardware and software assets — inventory, provisioning, reclaim, license true-up, and audit reconciliation against MDM and IdP sources.

packs.name: Facilities Management
packs.description: Multi-agent skill pack for corporate facilities operations. Triages inbound work orders, dispatches vendors, monitors SLAs, tracks space utilization, and produces exec digests.

packs.name: Travel & Expense
packs.description: Automates T&E compliance: parses receipts via OCR/LLM, checks against tenant-configured policy (per-diem limits, excluded categories, advance-approval rules), routes approval by amount tier, and batches reimbursements.

packs.name: Contract Lifecycle
packs.description: End-to-end contract lifecycle management: NDA to MSA to SOW. Classifies inbound deal intent, selects the right template, routes redlines, and tracks each contract stage. All counterparty-facing actions are HOTL-gated.

packs.name: IP Management
packs.description: Tracks patent and trademark portfolios across jurisdictions, fires deadline-aware renewal alerts, monitors competitor filings, and surfaces risk assessments for human review. All filing and counsel actions are HOTL-gated.

packs.name: ESG Reporting
packs.description: Aggregates Environmental (Scope 1/2/3 emissions), Social (DEI, workforce), and Governance metrics from accounting, HRIS, and supplier systems. Detects data gaps against CSRD, SASB, TCFD, and GRI frameworks, and drafts disclosure narratives. All regulatory submissions are HOTL-gated.

packs.name: Investor Relations
packs.description: Earnings call preparation, analyst Q&A classification and routing, and shareholder communication digest. All external-facing outputs are HOTL-gated (Reg FD compliance — zero selective disclosure).

packs.name: Board Prep
packs.description: Automates board meeting lifecycle: assembles agendas, assembles pre-read decks from KPI digests and exec memos, drafts minutes, and tracks action items. All distribution to board members is HOTL-gated.

packs.name: Kanban Automation
packs.description: Triages incoming requests onto the Hermes task board: classifies type, urgency, and owner-hint; auto-tags cards; detects bottlenecks; balances workload across board members. Compatible with xiaoguai v1.4 kanban subsystem.
